name: Terrell Stafford
abstract: Terell Lamark Stafford (born November 25, 1966) is a professional jazz trumpeter and the current Director of Jazz Studies at the Boyer College of Music and Dance at Temple University.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: A Jazzmobile Benefit
JVC Jazz Festival: Sweet Lorraine: A Jazz Celebration for the Village Vanguard
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Slide Hampton
about_quotes.evidence: This time will be Terrell Stafford, Antonio Hart, I think Renee Rosnes, John Lee and Dennis Mackrel. And they’re giving us the best cabins on the boat.
about_quotes.doc_title: Slide Hampton interviewed by Monk Rowe, West Orange, New Jersey, July 30, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Byron Stripling
about_quotes.evidence: And people would bring in Roy Hargrove and Tom Harrell and Terrell Stafford, and all people that I love, right?
about_quotes.doc_title: Byron Stripling interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 25, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]
